testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "inventory". testcase.name: @BeforeMethod setUp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for url to contain "cart".
